texto: I read as if time were running out, because technically it is. As I grow older I find I'm increasingly impatient with mediocre entertainments; I want books that will take my breath away and realign my vision - Barbara Kingsolver

As I grow older I find I'm increas…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, reading-books, running pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: Don't let reading make you arrogant. It can happen-believe me. Maybe you've even met a person or two like this, someone who thinks that being an English literature major or particularly well read puts them above the crowd. Take my advice:even if it's true, don't go there....I urge you to read, knowing the words you absorb will come out in your life in ways that inspire, uplift and encourage someone else. Life is meant to be passed on. Read with a servant's heart.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pat Williams: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Don't let reading make you arrogant. It can happen-believe me. Maybe you've even met a person or …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, inspirational-life, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reading.
